CREATE TABLE auth_requests (username VARCHAR, password VARCHAR, nonce VARCHAR, opaque VARCHAR, response VARCHAR);

SELECT username, vsp_calculate_digest(username, password, app_auth_vec('Authorization: Digest username="user1", realm="my_realm", nonce="noncevalue1", uri="/path", response="responsevalue1"')) AS calculated_digest FROM auth_requests WHERE username='user1';

SELECT username FROM auth_requests WHERE response = vsp_calculate_digest(username, password, app_auth_vec('Authorization: Digest username="user1", realm="my_realm", nonce="noncevalue1", uri="/path", response="responsevalue1"')) AND password = 'secret123';

CREATE PROCEDURE test_authentication() { DECLARE auth any; DECLARE checksum varchar; auth := app_auth_vec('Authorization: Digest username="user1", realm="my_realm", nonce="noncevalue1", uri="/path", response="responsevalue1"'); checksum := vsp_calculate_digest('user1', 'secret123', auth); IF (checksum IS NOT NULL AND checksum = get_keyword('response', auth)) THEN http('OK'); ELSE app_get_auth(); END IF; };

SELECT username FROM auth_requests WHERE response IS NOT NULL AND vsp_calculate_digest(username, password, app_auth_vec('Authorization: Digest username="user2", realm="my_realm", nonce="noncevalue2", uri="/path", response="responsevalue2"')) IN (SELECT response FROM auth_requests WHERE username='user2');
INSERT INTO invalid_auth VALUES ('Invalid data for testing vsp_calculate_digest');

CREATE VIEW valid_auth_view AS SELECT username, vsp_calculate_digest(username, password, app_auth_vec('Authorization: Digest username="user1", realm="my_realm", nonce="noncevalue1", uri="/path", response="responsevalue1"')) AS digest FROM auth_requests WHERE password IS NOT NULL;
